en: Did you see that the teaser for the new Avatar movie just came out We can hear an interesting phrase
ko: 새 아바타 영화 티저가 나온 거 봤어? 예고편 끝에 흥미로운 표현이

en: at the end of the trailer I know one thing wherever we go
ko: 나와. 난 한 가지 알아. 우리가 어디를 가든

en: Wherever means it doesn't matter the place or no matter where You can also apply this by adding
ko: Wherever는 장소가 상관없다는 뜻이야. WH 단어 끝에 ever를 붙여서 같은 방식으로 쓸 수 있어.

en: ever to the end of the following WH words Whatever no matter what Whoever
no matter who Whenever no matter when Whichever no matter which However
ko: 누구든. Whenever 언제든. Whichever 어느 것이든. However

en: Fortress is a large strong building that can be defended from attacks The phrase this family is our
ko: Fortress는 공격으로부터 방어할 수 있는 크고 튼튼한 건물이야. This family is our

en: fortress means that this family can protect us from outside attacks Be sure to like this video and share
ko: fortress라는 표현은 이 가족이 외부 공격으로부터 우리를 보호한다는 뜻이야. 이 영상 좋아요

en: it with a friend who is also learning English
